name: SerializationOptions
summary: Contains options for serializing -or storing- data, such as Rhino version and user data.

constructors.name: SerializationOptions
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the SerializationOptions class.

properties.name: RhinoVersion
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating the Rhino version.

properties.name: WriteUserData
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to write user data.
